\begin{tabular}{llll}
			
			\toprule
			\multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{Dimension}} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{SE}} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{KG}} & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textbf{LLM}} \\
			
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Correctness}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ stores corpus\\$-$ noisy content \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ stores corpus\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ precise operators \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ abstracts corpus\\$-$ hallucinations \end{tabular} \\ 
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Coverage}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ broad coverage \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ domain specific\\$-$ patchy coverage \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ broad coverage\\$-$ poor long tail \end{tabular} \\ 
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Completeness}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ complete results\\$-$ unclear scope \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ complete answers\\$-$ unclear scope \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ missing results\\$-$ unclear scope \end{tabular} \\ 
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Freshness}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ quick updates\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ news often text \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ deprecation\\$-$ structure lag \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ slow updates\\$-$ cold start \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Generation}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ no generation \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ ontologies/rules\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ graph learning \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ text generation \end{tabular} \\ 
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Synthesis}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ no integration\\$-$ no synthesis \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ data integration\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ synthesis \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ text integration\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ synthesis \end{tabular} \\ 
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Transparency}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ provenance\\$-$ opaque ranks \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ algorithmic\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ provenance \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ black box\\$-$ no provenance \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Coherency}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ consistent \\ $-$ rank variance \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ consistent \\ $+\hspace{0.14em}$ static analysis \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ inconsistent \\ $-$ (opt.) randomness \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Refinability}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ refinable\\$-$ opaque ranks \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ refinable \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ indirect refinement\\$-$ unpredictable \end{tabular} \\ 
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Fairness}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ content as-is\\$-$ bias in ranks \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ content as-is\\$-$ bias in coverage \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ generative biases\\$-$ needs safeguards \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Usability}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ natural language\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ simple queries \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ structured\\$-$ complex queries \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ natural language\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ conversational \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Expressivity}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ simple queries\\$-$ ambiguity \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ complex queries\\$-$ lacks nuance \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ complex queries\\$-$ ambiguity \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Efficiency}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ retrieval-based\\$+\hspace{0.14em}$ simple queries \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ retrieval-based\\$-$ complex queries \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ inference-based\\$-$ costly training \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Multilingualism}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ lang.\ dependent \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ lang.\ agnostic\\$-$ manual labels \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ multilinguality\\$-$ variable results \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
			\textbf{\textsc{Personalization}} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ limited context \\ $-$ not interactive \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $-$ limited context\\
				$-$ not personalizable \end{tabular} & \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}} $+\hspace{0.14em}$ in-context learn.\\
				$+\hspace{0.14em}$ personalizable \end{tabular} \\
			\midrule
			
		\end{tabular}

			\midrule

			\midrule

				\bad{not personalizable}} & \gbt{\good{in-context learn.}\\
